# 341 Meeting of Creditors - What to Expect [2026]
> Last updated: 2026-05-01

> What happens at the 341 meeting of creditors? Questions the trustee asks, what to bring, and how to prepare. 2026 guide.

## About
341meeting.org is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- 341 Meeting of Creditors - What to Expect: https://341meeting.org/
- 341 Meeting: Chapter 7 vs Chapter 13 Differences: https://341meeting.org/chapter-7-vs-chapter-13.html
- Documents to Bring to Your 341 Meeting: https://341meeting.org/documents-to-bring.html
- Phone vs In-Person 341 Meetings - Post-COVID Guide: https://341meeting.org/phone-vs-in-person.html
- 341 Meeting Preparation Checklist - What to Bring and Expect: https://341meeting.org/preparation-checklist.html
- Questions Asked at the 341 Meeting of Creditors: https://341meeting.org/questions-they-ask.html
- What Happens If You Miss Your 341 Meeting?: https://341meeting.org/what-happens-if-you-miss.html
- What to Expect at Your 341 Meeting: https://341meeting.org/what-to-expect.html
- 341 Meetings by Zoom and Phone: Post-COVID Guide: https://341meeting.org/zoom-vs-phone.html
- Privacy Policy: https://341meeting.org/privacy.html

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
